title: gleicheniastrum boryi
intro: Gleicheniastrum boryi, also known as the Bory's tree fern, is a species of plant in the family Dipteridaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is a type of tree fern that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gleicheniastrum boryi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts have also been used in modern herbal preparations to support immune function and overall well-being.
